name: financial-decision-record-audit-stream-reference
description: AGPL-3.0 reference implementation of the FinTech audit-stream. Runs the Meridian Financial × VendorF CreditMind v4.x canonical trajectory end-to-end. Enforces 2 orthogonal invariants on credit decisions: human-credit-officer-required on adverse-action-capable recommendations + FCRA permissible-purpose required on every credit-bureau pull (the strongest FCRA §604 audit-stream design in the Suite).
